ddls:
CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the researcher belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the equipment is used in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_scheduling" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trial */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the trial */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher conducting the trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_scheduling_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_scheduling_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "trial_type" TEXT /* Type of the trial (e.g., Punishment, Reward) */,
  "egs" INTEGER /* Experimental group identifier */,
  "alpha" REAL /* Alpha parameter of the trial */,
  "r" INTEGER /* R parameter of the trial */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher conducting the trial */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the trial belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "participant_name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "HCPID" TEXT /* Human Connectome Project Identifier */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial */,
  "response_switch_mean" REAL /* Mean response switch value */,
  "response_switch_std" REAL /* Standard deviation of response switch values */,
  "response_switch" REAL /* Actual response switch value */,
  "reaction_time" REAL /* Reaction time of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistical_measures" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of statistical measures */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response */,
  "PSwitch_z" REAL /* Z-score for the probability of a response switch */,
  "PSwitch_probz" REAL /* Probability of a response switch */,
  "PSwitch_logprobz" REAL /* Log probability of a response switch */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the statistical measures */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistical_measures_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sharing" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data share */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher sharing the data */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being shared */,
  "shared_date" TEXT /* Date the data was shared */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_usage_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_usage_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualization" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being visualized */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., bar chart, line chart) */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Data used for visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualization_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
